ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the facility is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the facility */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the facility is located */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the facility (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compartments" (
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compartment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the compartment belongs to */,
  "compartment_name" TEXT /* Name of the compartment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compartment */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the compartment belongs to */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of the compartment */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* Room number of the compartment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compartments_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource type (e.g., liters, kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the resource was consumed */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment where the resource was consumed */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the resource consumed */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the resource was consumed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of consumption */,
  "consumer" TEXT /* Consumer of the resource (e.g., machine, process) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_consumption_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_types" (
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste type */,
  "waste_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste type */,
  "disposal_method" TEXT /* Disposal method for the waste type (e.g., landfills, recycling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the waste was generated */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment where the waste was generated */,
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the waste generated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the waste */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the waste was generated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of generation */,
  "generator" TEXT /* Generator of the waste (e.g., machine, process) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_waste_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("waste_type_id") REFERENCES waste_types ("waste_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the emission occurred */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment where the emission occurred */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emission (e.g., CO2, NOx) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the emission */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the emission */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the emission occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of emission */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the emission (e.g., machine, process) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, environmental specialist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the data was accessed */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment where the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the change was made */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment where the change was made */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record being changed (e.g., resource consumption, waste generation) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being changed */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field being changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being reported on */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment being reported on */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report being generated (e.g., resource consumption, waste generation) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of report generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being notified about */,
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compartment being notified about */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification being sent (e.g., threshold exceeded, report available) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_compartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("compartment_id") REFERENCES compartments ("compartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)
